attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
 ,WNRTC.CONTEXT
 ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
 , WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   /*OAQ1FY15*/
 ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
 ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG WNRTC
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE
 WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV'
 AND EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
    WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   =   WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
    AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
    AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
   /* AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
    )
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG Y WHERE  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY )

SELECT
WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRTC.CONTEXT
,CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE
, NULL SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN WNRTC.CONTEXT = 'METRIX' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END METRIX_FLAG
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG WNRTC
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG Y WHERE  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY )

SELECT
WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN (NABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
OR (NABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
OR (NABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%') )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
OR (NABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
))
 THEN -9999
/*ARAJANAL-ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
/*KGUVVALA-ADDED FOR XAAS AS PART OF Q2FY15*/
/* Included NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */
WHEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) 
 ELSE 
     CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 
        CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
     ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID  END
 END AS LINE_ID,
/* Included NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSO_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
 ELSE
  /* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RCHETTRI */
  CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
 END AS ORDER_NUMBER
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG WNRTC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON  WNRTC.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
/* satchinn : LOT2B Modifications
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
ON NAATLA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
AND NAATLA.SS_CODE = WNRTC.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY */
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

/* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

 /* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (
 SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
 ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1 ) NSOLV
 ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID)
 AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'
 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY

/* Included as part of Q3FY15 OM LSS CR */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1
ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO1
ON NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO1.SALES_ORDER_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNRTC.ORG_ID
AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_CAL
ON NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND NSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD        
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
ON NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
/* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */                                 

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY     
/*ARAJANAL-ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABT
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY

SELECT
  NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  /*MIN(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME) AS GL_DATE,
  MAX(NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY*/
  MIN(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE) AS  GL_DATE,
  MAX(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
  
  /* Q3 changes */
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA
                  ON EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
                  AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'
                  AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA
                  ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM
                  AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID
                  AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID
                  AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
                  ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
                  AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
                  AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
				  
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME )     	   
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
		AND NATIL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19*/
  
  WHERE NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='N' AND /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19*/
  NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME<>'MERAKI-LICENSE' AND /* Added as part of Meraki Q2FY19*/
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE WHERE NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REV'
    AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_CG DRVD
    WHERE DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG')
  GROUP BY NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

SELECT
 /*NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE   AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,*/
 WNRTC.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
 
 ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,  

 /*WNRTC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     AS ACCOUNT_CODE,*/
 /* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT                 as ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */
 CASE WHEN WNGAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID
  ELSE SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID
 END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
 
 /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME    as ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */ 
 CASE WHEN WNGAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ELSE WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
 END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 
 WNRTC.ACCTD_AMOUNT     AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
 NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
 NULL         AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
 WNRTC.AMOUNT      AS AMOUNT,
 1 AS BATCH_ID,
 NULL        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NULL        AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
/* ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT  END  as CODE_COMBINATION_ID, */ /*  COMMENTED AS PART OF  CDC Q4FY18*/
 CASE WHEN  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN WNRTC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    
 ELSE ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT  END  as CODE_COMBINATION_ID, /*   case is added as part of CDC Q4FY18*/
 /*WNRTC.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,*/
 NULL        AS COGS_PERCENT,
 NULL        AS COMMENTS,
 WNRTC.CONTEXT       AS CONTEXT,
 current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
 1         as CREATED_BY,
 current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
 /*NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,*/
 WNRTC.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
 NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT         AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG    AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 NULL         AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
 'INV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
 WNRTC.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
 'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
 /*NULL       AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE, */
 WNRTC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE     AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
 current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 WNRTC.GL_DATE     AS GL_DATE,
 /*NAPC.GL_POSTED_DT    AS GL_POSTED_DATE,*/
 WNRTC.GL_POSTED_DATE, 
 NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
 NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
/*NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,*/ /*  COMMENTED AS PART OF CDC FY18*/
 CASE WHEN NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
 ELSE NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT END AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,  /*  ADDED AS PART OF CDC FY18*/
 /*NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE      AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,*/
 WNRTC.CURRENCY_CODE             AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,   
 NULL       AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
 NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
 current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
 NULL       AS LINE_PERCENT,
 NULL        AS LINE_SEQ_ID   , 
 NULL       AS LINE_TYPE,
 NULL       AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
 COALESCE(SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT)  AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID  ,
 WNGL.LINE_ID  AS  ORDER_LINE_ID , 
 WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER     as ORDER_NUMBER,
 WNRTC.ORG_ID      AS ORG_ID,
 NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 NULL       AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 'Y'        AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
 NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
 NULL       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
 NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
 CASE WHEN WNRTC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
   ELSE 999   
 END AS REQUEST_ID,
 /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  AS RULE_START_DATE, */
 CASE WHEN WNGAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  ELSE WNRTC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
 END AS  RULE_START_DATE,
 
 COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0)   AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
 /*KGUVVALA: ADDED for XAAS AS PART OF Q2FY15*/
 CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%') )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 ) )
 THEN 0
 WHEN WSCF.METRIX_FLAG ='Y' THEN COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
   ELSE COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
 END  AS SALES_REP_ID , 
 
 NULL           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NULL           AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 NULL           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE  , 
 100       AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,
 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/ 
 /*KGUVVALA: ADDED for XAAS AS PART OF Q2FY15*/
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 ) )
  THEN COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0)  ELSE COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_ID,0) END AS TERRITORY_ID , 
 /* CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE, */
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
  END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
 'O'          AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
 CASE WHEN WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' and NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN
    NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY 
   ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  
 END  as TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,
 NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
 NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
 NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
 WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  as TRX_TYPE,
 NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NULL       AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 'INV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 'Direct Sales' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 /*arajanal : modified for SAAS Q1FY15*/
 /*KGUVVALA: ADDED for XAAS AS PART OF Q2FY15*/
 CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 ) )
 THEN 'UNKNOWN'
 ELSE COALESCE(NDEF.SALES_REP_NUMBER,DEF_RULE.SALES_REP_NUMBER) END  SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
 CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))  /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
 ))
 THEN EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY /* MODIFIED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
 ELSE COALESCE(NDEF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,DEF_RULE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) END  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 FROM 
 (SELECT * FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_CNTRY_SLS_CREDIT_DEFAULT_TV WHERE BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'UNK' AND END_TV_DT='3500-01-01' AND  UPPER(BK_TRX_SOURCE_TYPE_CD) = 'REVLINE' ) DEF_RULE,
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG WNRTC
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON WNRTC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_CG WNGL 
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_CG WNGAR  
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNGAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG WSCF
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WSCF.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 
 /*left outer join $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
  ON WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRTC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY        
  
  /* use ST_OM_RA_RULES for rule_id : rchettri 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
  on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
 */ 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
  ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME

 ,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE

 ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
 ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG

 ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE
 WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM'
 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
  WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT  =  WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
  AND X.SS_CD = WNRTC.SS_CODE
  AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
   /* AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
  )
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG Y WHERE  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY )
SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WHERE 1=2

SELECT
  NATLGD.SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  as AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , /*OAQ1FY15*/
  /*MIN(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME) AS GL_DATE,
  MAX(NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY*/
  MIN(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE) AS  GL_DATE,
  MAX(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
  
  /* Q3 changes */
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA
                  ON EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
                  AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'
                  AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA
                  ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM
                  AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID
                  AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID
                  AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
                  ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
                  AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
                  AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
    
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE WHERE NATLGD.SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REV'
  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
  GROUP BY NATLGD.SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

 ,'C'  SOURCE_TYPE
 ,WNRTC.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
 ,CASE WHEN WNRTC.CONTEXT = 'METRIX' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END METRIX_FLAG
 ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG WNRTC
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
WHERE WNRTC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM')
AND (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE BRAZIL*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
)
AND EXISTS
          ( 
            SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL, 
                 ( SELECT RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP WHERE RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0 GROUP BY 1 ) ERP 
    WHERE EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
    AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' 
    AND EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
          )

  ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) ) AS AMOUNT

                  AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
      
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT

  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL

  /*OA Q1FY15>>*/

  /*<<OA Q1FY15*/
  /* Q3 changes */
/*  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB

                  AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   */

	   /*  added as part of CDC Q4FY18--START */

/*  CDC-end*/   	   
    
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE WHERE NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REV'
    AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ='CDC'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_CDC DRVD
    WHERE DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ='CDC')
  GROUP BY NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

SELECT 
  WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  , NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
  ,WNICE.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY      
  ,WNICE.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY        
  ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
   CASE WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND UPPER(NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME) NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
     OR (  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
        /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
    AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER') 
    OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA'
          OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM')
    OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX'
   THEN NATIL_ADJ.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
   END
  ELSE
   CASE WHEN ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
    OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
       /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */ 
 AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
  COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME)
   END
  END AS RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
  ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
   CASE WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND UPPER(NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME) NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
     OR (  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
        /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
   AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER') 
    OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA'
          OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM' )
    OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX'
    THEN
    NATIL_ADJ.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
   END
  ELSE
   CASE WHEN ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
    OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
       /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
   AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
    NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
   END
  END AS RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
  ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
  ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
  ,WNICE.GL_DATE
  ,WNICE.SS_CODE
  ,NULL AS CONTEXT 
  ,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY AS  ITEM_KEY
  ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN (
    CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
     ELSE
     (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
      END AS   AMOUNT
  , ((CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *
    (CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN 
   (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
     ELSE
     (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
      END)) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT 
  ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
  ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
  , WNICE.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
  /* ADDED NEW COLUMNS */
  ,WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  ,WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE  AS CURRENCY_CODE
  ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DATE
  ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
  /*,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT */
  ,COALESCE(WNIVI.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,-999) AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
  ,WNICE.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
 , WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
   ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
   AND WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_CDC  WNIVI
   ON WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
   ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY*/
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ
   ON WNICE.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
   ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
   ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_ADJ
   ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
   ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
   AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
  /* commented : rchettri
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR 
   ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
  */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
   ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
   /*AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE */
   AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
   AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
   AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
   /*INNER JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
     FROM
     $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
     ON    (        
              ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
     )  
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
  ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1
   )ENGLA 
        ON (ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
        AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CDC'  )   */
  WHERE
   ( NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  LIKE '%VARIABLE%' OR UPPER(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' )
   AND UPPER(COALESCE(WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE,'NA')) =  'REVENUE TRANSFER'
   AND ( UPPER(COALESCE(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,'NA')) IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS', 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
   OR (UPPER(COALESCE(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,'NA')) LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND UPPER(COALESCE(NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME,'NA')) LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ )
   /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */
   /* AND WNICE.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY  < 0 */   
   AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'
   AND WNICE.SS_CODE='CDC'
   AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG X WHERE X.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  AND X.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)

SELECT 
 NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 ,NATLGD.SS_CODE
 /*,CAST(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) GL_DATE*/
 ,CAST(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) GL_DATE
 ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY     
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
 ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
 /*,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY */
 ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
 ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
 ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
 /*,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 ,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE   */
 ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 ,EXALA.CURRENCY_CODE AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
 ,CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS TRX_DATE 
 , EAMPD.FISCAL_ID 
 ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
 /*ADDED THE FOLLOWING COLUMNS IN CURSOR*/
 ,EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE
 ,NSOB.CURRENCY_CODE
 ,NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE   AS   ACCOUNT_CLASS
 /*,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ACCOUNTED_DR ELSE EXALA.ACCOUNTED_CR END       AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
 ,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ENTERED_DR ELSE EXALA.ENTERED_CR END                 AS AMOUNT  */
 ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)) ACCTD_AMOUNT
 ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) ) AS AMOUNT
 ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
 ,ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
 ,NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
 ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT /*ADDED OAQ1FY15*/
 FROM
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 /* Q3 changes */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA
                 ON EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
                 AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                 AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'
                 AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA
                 ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM
                 AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID
                 AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
                 ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
                 AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
                 AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
     
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
 /* Q3 changes */
 /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                 ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID
                 AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  */    
 /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_POSTING_CONTROL NAPC
 ON NAPC.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY  = NATLGD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY*/
 
/* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
      ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
      AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME ) */  /*   COMMENTED AS PART OF CDC Q4FY18*/
	  
/*  added as part of CDC Q4FY18--START */    
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID
AND NSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
    ON    (        
             ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
    ) 
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
	ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1	
  )ENGLA 
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME )  
/*  CDC-end*/    	  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL       
                  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
				  
				  
 WHERE 1=1
 /*NAPC.GL_POSTED_DT IS NOT NULL*/
 AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
 /* nnainala : COALESCE is not req'd as GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE is NOT NULL */ 
 /*AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'*/
 AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE = 'Y'
 AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'
 AND (NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' OR NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG IS NULL)
 AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REC'
 AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE'
 AND NATLGD.SS_CODE = 'CDC' 
 /*AND NATLGD.GL_DATETIME BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE */
 AND EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
 AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
 
    /*OAQ1FY15 >>*/
  AND NOT EXISTS /* donot pull already populated records */
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WI
  WHERE NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   /* knarlapu: Added below conditions so that non-offer attributed records are not missed*/
   AND WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS = 'REC'
   AND WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   AND WI.SS_CODE='CDC'
  )   
   /*<<OAQ1FY15*/  
 
 AND  NOT EXISTS 
               ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
    WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
    AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND NATLGD.SS_CODE='CDC'
    )
  AND NOT EXISTS 
            ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
   WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   AND DRVDB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
   AND NATLGD.SS_CODE='CDC'
   )
     AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('PP-XAAS','PP-TAX-I-XAAS','PP-CMAPP-XAAS','PP-TAX-CM-XAAS','PP-TAX-DM-XAAS')
   
 /* --- */
 UNION
 SELECT 
 NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 ,NATLGD.SS_CODE
 /*,CAST(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) GL_DATE*/
 ,CAST(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) GL_DATE
 ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY     
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
 ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 /*,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY */
 ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
 ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
 ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
 /*,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

 ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) ) AS AMOUNT

 ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT /*ADDED OAQ1FY15*/
 FROM
 /* $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD, */
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG NATLGD 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 /* Q3 changes */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA
                 ON EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
                 AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                 AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'
                 AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA
                 ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM
                 AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID
                 AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
                 ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
                 AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
                 AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
     
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
 /* Q3 changes */
 /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                 ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID
                 AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE */
 /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_POSTING_CONTROL NAPC
 ON NAPC.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY  = NATLGD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY*/
 /*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
      ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
      AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME ) */  /*   COMMENTED AS PART OF Q4FY18*/
	  
/*  added as part of CDC Q4FY18--START */    

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID
AND NSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 

INNER JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
    ON    (        
             ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
    )  
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
	ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1
  )ENGLA 
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME )  
/*  CDC-end*/    	 

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL       
                  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
 WHERE 1=1
 /*NAPC.GL_POSTED_DT IS NOT NULL*/
 AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
 /* nnainala : COALESCE is not req'd as GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE is NOT NULL */ 
 /* AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y' */
 AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE = 'Y'
 AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'
 AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REC'
 AND (NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'N' OR NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG IS NULL)
 AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE'
 AND NATLGD.SS_CODE='CDC'
 /*AND NATLGD.GL_DATETIME BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE */
 AND EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
 AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
 
    /*OAQ1FY15 >>*/
  AND NOT EXISTS /* donot pull already populated records */
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WI
  WHERE NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
  /* knarlapu: Added below conditions so that non-offer attributed records are not missed*/
   AND WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS = 'REC'
   AND WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND WI.SS_CODE='CDC'
  )   
   /*<<OAQ1FY15*/  
 
 AND  NOT EXISTS 
               ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
    WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
    AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
    AND NATLGD.SS_CODE='CDC'
    )
  AND NOT EXISTS 
            ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
   WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   AND DRVDB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
   AND NATLGD.SS_CODE='CDC'
   )
     AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('PP-XAAS','PP-TAX-I-XAAS','PP-CMAPP-XAAS','PP-TAX-CM-XAAS','PP-TAX-DM-XAAS')

SELECT 
   WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   , NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
   ,WNICE.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY      
   ,WNICE.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
   
   ,CASE  WHEN  CASE  WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
         ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
       END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
     THEN 
	CASE WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND UPPER(NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME) NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
     OR (  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
        /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */      
           AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER'
          )
         OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA'
         OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM')
         OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX'
        THEN  NATIL_ADJ.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
      END
	ELSE CASE WHEN ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
    OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
        /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */  
   AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' 
         THEN COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME)
       END
   END AS RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
   
   ,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
         ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
       END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
     THEN 
	CASE WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND UPPER(NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME) NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' )/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
     OR (  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
     OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%'))) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
        /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */  
           AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER'
          ) 
         OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA'
         OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ', 'T4C - SERVICE CM')
         OR UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX'
        THEN  NATIL_ADJ.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
      END
     ELSE CASE WHEN ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX') 
    OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')))/*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/)
        /* kguvvala - Added as part of XAAS-Q3FY16 */  
   AND WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' 
         THEN  NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
       END
   END AS RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
   
   ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
   ,WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
   ,WNICE.GL_DATE
   ,WNICE.SS_CODE
   ,NULL AS CONTEXT 
   ,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY AS  ITEM_KEY
   ,COALESCE(WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
   ,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN 
    (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
    ELSE
    (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
    END AS   AMOUNT 
   , ((CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *
    (CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN 
    (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
    ELSE
    (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
    END)) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
   ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID
   ,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
   , WNICE.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
   /* ADDED NEW COLUMNS */
   ,WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   ,WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE  AS CURRENCY_CODE
   ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DATE
   ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
   ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS
   ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
   /*,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT */
   ,COALESCE(WNIVI.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,-999) AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
   ,WNICE.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
  , WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
    ON WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
    AND WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_CDC  WNIVI
    ON WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
   /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ
    ON WNICE.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
    ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_ADJ
    ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
    ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
    AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
   /* commented : rchettri
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR 
    ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
   */
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
    ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
    /*AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE */
    AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
    AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
   /* INNER JOIN (
     SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
      FROM
      $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
      ON    (        
               ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
      AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
      AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
      AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
      AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
      AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
      )  
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
   ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1
    )ENGLA 
         ON (ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
         AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CDC'  )   */
   WHERE
    ( NATIL_ADJ.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME LIKE '%VARIABLE%' OR UPPER(NATIL_ADJ.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES') 
    /* AND WNICE.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY  < 0 */
    AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'
    AND WNICE.SS_CODE='CDC'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG X WHERE X.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  AND X.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)

  ,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN 
   /* OA Q1FY15 */
      (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
     ELSE
     (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
      END AS   AMOUNT 
  ,((CASE WHEN WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *
    (CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN 
   (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_DBT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
     ELSE
     (CASE WHEN NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG = 'Y' THEN NATIL.RU_OFFER_ATRBTD_CRDT_TRX_AMT     ELSE      NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT END)
      END)) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT 
  ,WNICE.FISCAL_ID

  ,WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY

  ,WNICE.GL_POSTED_DATE
  ,WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,WNICE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
  /*,WNICE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT */
  ,COALESCE(WNIVI.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT,-999) AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
  ,WNICE.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
 , WNICE.PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
  FROM

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_CDC  WNIVI
  ON WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
  ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICE.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICE.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
  ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON WNICE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  /* commented : rchettri
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR

  */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
  ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICE.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
  /*AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE */
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = WNICE.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICE.TRX_DATE
  AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'     
 /*  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
     FROM
     $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
     ON    (        
              ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
     AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
     )  
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
  ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1
   )ENGLA 
        ON (ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNIVI.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
        AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CDC'  )  */  
  WHERE
  WNICE.SS_CODE='CDC'
  AND ( NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME LIKE '%VARIABLE%' OR UPPER(NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' )

SELECT
WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
/*MIN(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE) AS  GL_DATE,   -- HOW TO DERIVE. THIS IS FURTHER USED TO POPULATE ACCOUTING_RULE_START_DATE FOR CM TRXNS IN ACNT_RULE PIPELINE*/
MIN(WNICE.GL_DATE) AS  GL_DATE,             /* IN WNICE, DERIVED AS CAST(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) GL_DATE*/
MAX(NII.SALES_ACCOUNT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WNICE 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC    ON WNICE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL    ON WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII   ON NII.ITEM_KEY=NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=1 
 /*ADDED BELOW JOINS AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/ 
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY )
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON      NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   */   
  /*END OF Q2FY21 ATHENA JOINS*/
WHERE   WNICE.ACCOUNT_CLASS = 'REC'
AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG'
AND ( NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' OR NATIL.REV_ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME='MERAKI-LICENSE'/*ADDED AS PART OF MERAKI Q2FY19*/
OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL WHERE ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX NMRT WHERE NMRT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY))        
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_CG DRVD WHERE DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
					AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG')
--AND (NATL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME NOT LIKE '%FSUB%'AND NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('Recurring'))/*ADDED THIS JOIN AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/
GROUP BY WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

 /*NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,*/ /*  COMMENTED AS PART OF CDC FY18*/

    CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0)

         WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')

    CASE WHEN SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN SC_TV_ERP.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
         WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX')
    OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN  ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
	OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD'))/*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	) )
         THEN -999
         ELSE COALESCE(SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,SC_TV_ORIG.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT) END AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
    NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
    FROM 
    $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_CG WNRTC
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON WNRTC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_CG WNGL 
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_CG WNGAR
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNGAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG WSCF
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WSCF.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
     ON WNRTC.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY*/
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
     ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRTC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
    /* use st_om_ra_rules for rule_id : rchettri
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR  ---------
     on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
    */ 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
     ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES  SMRR_CUR 
     ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
     
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON WNRTC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
     ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_POSTING_CONTROL NAPC
     ON NAPC.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY  = NATLGD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTC.ITEM_KEY ) 
  
    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC  START*/      
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    
 ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
 AND WNRTC.SS_CODE='CDC')   
 /*  END*/   
  
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
     ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNRTC.ORG_ID
     AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'  
    LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV 
     ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
     AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
     AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
      /* AND SC_TV.END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'    */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV_ORIG 
     ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID 
     AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
     AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD =  EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD
   
   AND NOT EXISTS  /* knarlapu: added to pick only CG record in case of same line  exixts in CG and Non-CG */
    (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP X WHERE  SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT 
    AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD 
    AND X.SS_CD = 'CG'  )
      /* XAAS SALES CREDITING CHANGES*/
    LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS  SC_TV_XAAS 
     ON SC_TV_XAAS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =  WSCF.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
     AND SC_TV_XAAS.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
    --AND SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0
     /*AND (SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT>0 OR SC_TV_XAAS.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT<-1000000000)*/ /*Q3FY18 SC BIG_INT CHANGE */
     
    /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel : Added below join to refer ERP SC table for XAAS Non reference trx */  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  
    ( SELECT SC_TV.* FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP SC_TV
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XAAS_TRX_FROM_ERP_SC EL 
     ON EL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
       WHERE SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0
        AND EL.NON_REF_TRX_FLAG = 'Y'    
    ) SC_TV_ERP 
    ON SC_TV_ERP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY =  WNRTC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  
  
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
      ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
      AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
      AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC_ORIG
      ON SC_TV_ORIG.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
      AND SC_TV_ORIG.SS_CD = NSOL_SC_ORIG.SS_CODE
      AND SC_TV_ORIG.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'  
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
     ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC_ORIG
     ON NSOL_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
    /* commented : rchettri
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
     on ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
     AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    */ 
    /* START: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
     ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
     AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE   
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
     ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
     ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
     AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SS_CODE   
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL
     ON NSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
    /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */  
    /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD  
     ON EAMPD.FISCAL_ID = WNRTC.FISCAL_ID
    */ 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
     ON  WNRTC.FISCAL_ID =  NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
       /*ARAJANAL : added for SAAS Q1FY15*/
    LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    
    
   /*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
   /* LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
    ON (NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)*/
    LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
    ON (CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
               END = MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
   /*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
   
    LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
    ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
    /*LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
    ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
    ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))
    AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME   : COMMENTED AS PART OF Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
    /*ARAJANAL : added for SAAS Q1FY15*/
    /*PRMADDAL: ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY18 TO DERIVE SALESREP_ID AND SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID FOR XAAS*/
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_XAAS    
    ON ESP_XAAS.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_REP_NUM    
    AND ESP_XAAS.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2                
    ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_XAAS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2    
    ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2.NAME  = SC_TV_XAAS.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
    AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    
      /* Q2FY19 Dec Rel Non Reference Trx Changes */ 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESP_ERP    
   ON ESP_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SC_TV_ERP.SALES_REP_NUMBER    
   AND ESP_ERP.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP                
   ON EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SC_TV_ERP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   AND EST_INIT_VAR2_ERP.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP    
   ON ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP.NAME  = SC_TV_ERP.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE    
   AND ESCT_INIT_VAR2_ERP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
    
    WHERE 1=1
    AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'

SELECT 
  NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  ,NATLGD.SS_CODE
  /*,CAST(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) GL_DATE*/
  ,CAST(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) GL_DATE
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY     
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
  ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
  /*,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY */
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
  ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
  /*,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE   */
  ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,EXALA.CURRENCY_CODE AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS TRX_DATE 
  , EAMPD.FISCAL_ID 
  ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
  /*ADDED THE FOLLOWING COLUMNS IN CURSOR*/
  ,EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE
  ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE   AS   ACCOUNT_CLASS
  /*,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ACCOUNTED_DR ELSE EXALA.ACCOUNTED_CR END       AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
  ,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ENTERED_DR ELSE EXALA.ENTERED_CR END                 AS AMOUNT  */
  ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)) ACCTD_AMOUNT
  ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) ) AS AMOUNT
  ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
  ,ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
  ,NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
  ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT /*ADDED OAQ1FY15*/
  FROM
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  /* Q3 changes */
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA
                  ON EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
                  AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ALL'
                  AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA
                  ON EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM = EXDLA.AE_LINE_NUM
                  AND EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXDLA.AE_HEADER_ID
                  AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID
                  AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
                  ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
                  AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
                  AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
                  AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
      
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
  /*OA Q1FY15>>*/
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL ON
      NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  /*<<OA Q1FY15*/
  /* Q3 changes */
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                  ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID
                  AND NSOB.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE      
  /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_POSTING_CONTROL NAPC
  ON NAPC.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY  = NATLGD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY*/
 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
       ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
       AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME )  
   /*ADDED BELOW JOINS AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY )	 	   


  WHERE 1=1
    
  /*NAPC.GL_POSTED_DT IS NOT NULL*/
   
      /*OAQ1FY15 >>*/
   AND NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG  = 'N' 
    /*<<OAQ1FY15*/
   
  AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
  /* nnainala : COALESCE is not req'd as GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE is NOT NULL */ 
  /*AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'*/
  AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE = 'Y'
  AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'
  AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REC'
  AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE'
  AND NATLGD.SS_CODE ='CG'
  /*AND NATLGD.GL_DATETIME BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE */
  AND EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
  AND  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXAHA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)
  AND NOT ( (NATL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME LIKE '%FSUB%' OR NATL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME LIKE '%FSS%' OR NATL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME in ('DNAX_Switching','HYBWRK-HAAS','HYBWRK-SAAS'))AND NATIL.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' AND COALESCE(NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') IN ('Recurring') ) /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */	
   
      /*OAQ1FY15 >>*/
   AND NOT EXISTS /* donot pull already populated records */
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_CG WI
   WHERE NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
   /* knarlapu: Added below conditions so that non-offer attributed records are not missed*/
   AND WI.ACCOUNT_CLASS = 'REC'
   AND WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
   AND WI.SS_CODE  ='CG'
   )   
    /*<<OAQ1FY15*/
   
   
  AND  NOT EXISTS 
                ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR 
     WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
     AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
	 AND NATLGD.SS_CODE ='CG'
     )
   AND NOT EXISTS 
             ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
    WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
    AND DRVDB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
	AND NATLGD.SS_CODE ='CG'
    )
    AND NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE NOT IN ('PP-XAAS','PP-TAX-I-XAAS','PP-CMAPP-XAAS','PP-TAX-CM-XAAS','PP-TAX-DM-XAAS')
    
  /* --- */
  UNION
  SELECT 
  NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
  ,NATLGD.SS_CODE
  /*,CAST(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) GL_DATE*/
  ,CAST(EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) GL_DATE
  ,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
  ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY     
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
  ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
  ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
  /*,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY */
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
  ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
  /*,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE   */
  ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  ,EXALA.CURRENCY_CODE AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS TRX_DATE 
  ,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as FISCAL_ID 
  ,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
  /*ADDED THE FOLLOWING COLUMNS IN CURSOR*/
  ,EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE
  ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
  ,NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE   AS   ACCOUNT_CLASS
  /*,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ACCOUNTED_DR ELSE EXALA.ACCOUNTED_CR END       AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
  ,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ENTERED_DR ELSE EXALA.ENTERED_CR END                 AS AMOUNT  */
  ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0)) ACCTD_AMOUNT
  ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) ) AS AMOUNT
  ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
  ,ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
  ,NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
